steps.title: Notice the two-part structure
steps.content: The text first defines horizontal gene transfer and says it is common among prokaryotes. It then explains why the process matters: preventing it could reduce dangerous antibiotic-resistant pathogens.

steps.title: Reject invented structures
steps.content: Choice A invents a history of research. Choice B shifts the focus to one threatening organism. Choice C claims the text compares two organisms, but the named bacteria are examples. The text describes a biological process and its importance. The answer is D.
